title: Enge En Punnagai Lyrics Thaalam
stanzas:
[Yenge en punnagai
evar kondu ponadhu
thee patta megamaai
en nenju aanadhu

megathai anaikka
vaa vaa vaa vaa
thaalathil nee seravaa oh..
thaalisai naan paadavaa](2)

mazhai neeril dhegamo
theppam pol nanainthadhu
theppal pol nanaindhadhil
vetkam yaen karaindhadhu(2)

ennaadi polave
en enjam kulaindhadhu
nee seiyyum leelaiyai
nee seiyya manam yengudhu

thaalathil nee seravaa oh..
thaalisai naan paadavaa

Pani sindhum sooriyan
adhu undhan paarvaiyo
pookkalin raanuvam
adhu undhan maeniyo

kanne un nenjamo
kadal konda aalamo
nam sondham koodumo
oliyin nizhal aagumo..

thaalathil nee seravaa oh..
thaalisai naan paadavaa

Yenge en punnagai
evar kondu ponadhu
thee patta megamaai
en nenju aanadhu

megathai anaikka
vaa vaa vaa vaa
thaalathil nee seravaa oh..
thaalisai naan paadavaa

thaalathil nee seravaa oh..
thaalisai naan paadavaa(2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, reflecting on the beauty of cherished moments.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Thaalam.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary S.P. Balasubramaniam and Shoba.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Enge En Punnagai was composed by the acclaimed A.R. Rahman.

When was this song released?

The song was released on August 13, 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Enge En Punnagai, the lyrics evoke a sense of yearning and romantic nostalgia, perfectly encapsulating the emotions of love. The song unfolds in a context where the characters reflect on their cherished memories and the essence of their relationship. With its soothing melody and heartfelt delivery, it resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced love. The collaboration of S.P. Balasubramaniam and Shoba under A.R. Rahman's composition creates a timeless piece that continues to touch hearts.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enge En Punnagai from Thaalam is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of S.P. Balasubramaniam and Shoba, this song takes listeners on a nostalgic journey filled with heartfelt emotions. A.R. Rahman's magical composition adds a unique charm, making it a timeless classic in Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: Where has my smile gone, my heart is burning like a fire?
Come, come, come, come, will you join me in the rhythm? Oh.. I will sing the melody.
In the rain, I felt like a boat floating, why did I feel ashamed in that thought?
What is happening to me, you are playing your tricks, where is my heart going?
Come and take away my loneliness with your memories...
Will you join me in the rhythm? Oh.. I will sing the melody.
The cool breeze is like the sun, is that your gaze? The flowers bloom, is that your charm?
Oh dear, is your heart like the sea? Will our bond unite, will it become the shadow of light?
Will the love rain pour down, will it fill with tears? Is that the end of time?
Will you join me in the rhythm? Oh.. I will sing the melody.
Where has my smile gone, my heart is burning like a fire?
Come, come, come, come, will you join me in the rhythm? Oh.. I will sing the melody.
Will you join me in the rhythm? Oh.. I will sing the melody.
